note: Joy's locked reference matrix — the angles that instill the split two-piece construction so scenes hold it. Gary-approved 2026-07-19.
hard_rule: Joy's lower body is the AITX mark's TWO rigid arrowhead legs with a vertical split. They are LOGO shapes, never anatomical legs (no knees, feet, or bending). Dynamic 'walking/jumping' poses break this — avoid them.
